# BotCommLayer/Models — generated vs. hand-written protobuf code

This folder separates **generated** C# (in the `Generated/` subfolder) from the
one **hand-written** file (here in `Models/`). Read this before editing anything.

## Generated — DO NOT EDIT (`Generated/`)

These five files are produced by the protobuf compiler into `Generated/`. Each
carries a `// <auto-generated> ... DO NOT EDIT!` header. Any manual change is
**overwritten on the next regen**, so edits there are silently lost:

| File | Source `.proto` |
|------|-----------------|
| `Generated/Communication.cs` | `ProtoDef/communication.proto` |
| `Generated/Game.cs` | `ProtoDef/game.proto` |
| `Generated/Pathfinding.cs` | `ProtoDef/pathfinding.proto` |
| `Generated/Database.cs` | `ProtoDef/database.proto` |
| `Generated/Scenedata.cs` | `ProtoDef/scenedata.proto` |

To change the wire contract, **edit the `.proto` file**, then regenerate and commit
the `.proto` + regenerated `.cs` together:

```bat
:: from repo root — C# outputs
Exports\BotCommLayer\Models\ProtoDef\protocsharp.bat
:: C++ outputs (when the native side consumes the contract)
Exports\BotCommLayer\Models\ProtoDef\protocpp.bat
```

## Hand-written — edit freely

- `WoWActivitySnapshotExtensions.cs` — the **only** hand-authored file in this
  folder. It is deliberately excluded from the protobuf `applyTo` glob.

## See also

- `.github/instructions/protobuf.instructions.md` — the area rules (the source of
  truth for this contract).
- `../CLAUDE.md` — BotCommLayer component context.
- `docs/IPC_COMMUNICATION.md` — IPC details (length-framed protobuf over TCP).
